finding_results.evidence: chapters/chapter_15.md:255; chapters/chapter_15.md:281; chapters/chapter_15.md:305; chapters/chapter_15.md:317; chapters/chapter_15.md:321; chapters/chapter_15.md:335
finding_results.notes: The fleeing researcher now has a concrete identifier and goal: he tries to get back to room 3E for clonidine during Lena's confiscation sweep. His death immediately produces a new carry-only regime, stair access by permission, and visible survivor behavior changes in the corridor.
Marcus's ex-wife relay is now a Subaru-title message tied to divorce logistics and ordinary outside life, with no reuse of the style-bible food/eating example.

The chapter keeps the single current temperature mention in the cafeteria scene and revises the later frost passage to image-only language without repeating the thirty-eight-degree state or the prediction delta.
Lena's entrance now arrives without the clipboard re-identification and lets the established power dynamic carry the scene.
Chapter word count is 4140 after expanding the Tomás aftermath, Marcus scene, and stairwell/confiscation sequence while preserving the heading contract.

summary: Expanded Chapter 15 to 4140 words, tied Tomás's off-ledger stash to a building-wide confiscation regime, replaced Marcus's style-bible-derived relay beat, removed the redundant temperature restatement and Lena clipboard tag, and made the late stairwell killing create a concrete new pressure state for the six-survivor handoff into Chapter 16.
